Based on the README.md file in the webapp project, here are all the API endpoints mentioned:

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/users` | List all users |
| POST | `/api/users` | Create a new user |
| GET | `/api/health` | Health check |

There are 3 API endpoints in total documented in the README.md.
